content:
Hello, currently i'm working in my v3 and Dirk Behme stated in v2 that my test are not building and he was correct. I did the test again, but i can't build yet. How I can build the doc tests? make LLVM=1 rusttest just pass in kernel/lib.rs but doesn't enter in kernel/transmute.rs (my doctest is located there).

Thanks in advance!
Every2 has marked this topic as resolved.

I am not sure if this was intended to be marked as resolved, since there is no message after the first one, but please see https://docs.kernel.org/rust/testing.html#the-kunit-tests if you haven't seen it yet.

Hi, @Miguel Ojeda I solved the error and closed. I was sending v3, but I received other answer and currently doing the requested changes: https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/20241012193657.290cc79c@eugeo/T/#t

Thanks for worrying. :)
